steps.args: -c 'Q=$(mac-qr-read.sh "$LAST_FILE"); case "$Q" in WIFI:*) SSID=$(echo "$Q"|sed -n "s/.*S:\([^;]*\).*/\1/p"); PWD=$(echo "$Q"|sed -n "s/.*P:\([^;]*\).*/\1/p"); networksetup -setairportnetwork en0 "$SSID" "$PWD" ;; http*) open "$Q" ;; *) echo "$Q"|pbcopy; osascript -e "display notification \"е†…е®№е·Іе…Ґе‰Єиґґжќї\" with title \"QR\"" ;; esac'
